def positive_state_changing_endpoint_returns_200_with_empty_body():
    rule_id = "state_changing_endpoint_returns_200_with_empty_body"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "State-changing POST/PUT endpoint returns HTTP 200 with an empty body; prefer 201/202/204."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
